codeReview.summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff. The implementation cleanly addresses the targeted fidelity gaps: removed inline Lock CTA from Running state, corrected Pending Approvals subject/TTL copy, added active Policies header affordance, and added focused regression tests for VAL-DSH-002/003/006/019/020 and related runtime states. No actionable code defects were identified in the changed files.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature metadata has a wording drift for relays-offline behavior: expectedBehavior calls for "Some relays are offline" plus an affected-relay list, but the validation contract and Paper-aligned implementation assert the "All Relays Offline" degraded-readiness state.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:1270 vs validation-contract.md:470-472; implementation copy in src/screens/DashboardScreen/states/RelaysOfflineState.tsx:44

summary: Pass. The reviewed commit implements the intended dashboard runtime-state fidelity fixes and adds durable tests; no blocking or non-blocking defects were found in scope.
